title: delivery.rs: contentMap serializes as null when language undetected
description: In process_batch, 'contentMap': detected_lang.map(|l| json!({l: html})) produces 'contentMap': null in the JSON output when detect_language returns None. The ActivityPub spec (AS2) defines contentMap as a Language-Value map; null is not a valid value and may cause parsing errors or unexpected behavior in receiving implementations that expect an object. The field should be omitted entirely when no language is detected. Fix: conditionally insert contentMap into the object only when detected_lang is Some.
close_reason: Fixed: contentMap only emitted when language detected, absent otherwise.
